subject: How to refine linear components of tilt series alignments?
body:
Hello all,

I am looking for a way to get improved tilt series alignments out of Warp/M.
My current workflow uses AreTomo (with -OutImod 1) to align tilt series for 
tomogram reconstruction.
The reconstructions are okay — good enough to resolve and average ribosomes.
However, they are clearly not perfect.
I would really like a way to use the particle poses to directly improve the 
tilt series alignments.
These are the parameters that IMOD records in its .tlt and .xf files and 
that Warp records as Angle, AxisAngle, AxisOffsetX, AxisOffsetY in its .xml 
files.
I do *not* want to model nonlinear deformation at the moment.

Any tips?
